name: CybelAngel Asset Discovery & Leak Intelligence API
what_it_does: CybelAngel Asset Discovery and Leak Intelligence REST API for digital risk protection and exposed asset detection platform. Enables AI agents to manage data leak and exposure alert retrieval and classification, handle exposed file and cloud storage detection monitoring, access leaked credentials and sensitive document tracking, retrieve attack surface mapping and internet-exposed asset discovery data, manage alert triage and remediation workflow automation, handle dark web and closed source intelligence monitoring, access third-party risk exposure from vendor data leaks, retrieve code repository exposure and source code leak detection, manage brand impersonation and domain squatting alerts, and integrate CybelAngel intelligence with SIEM, SOAR, and incident response platforms.
use_cases: Monitoring exposed files and data leaks from data protection agents
Detecting credential exposures from identity protection agents
Managing attack surface visibility from security operations agents
Integrating leak intelligence with SIEM from security monitoring agents
not_for: Internal vulnerability management without external exposure monitoring
Network security without data leak and exposure detection focus
Consumer security without enterprise digital risk protection
best_when: An enterprise using CybelAngel wants AI agents to automate data leak monitoring, exposed asset detection, credential exposure tracking, third-party risk visibility, and SIEM/SOAR integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Automated response to data leak detections must include data classification review — not all exposed files are confirmed sensitive. Source code exposure requires developer notification workflow, not automated repo deletion. Credential exposure response must be measured — bulk forced password resets can disrupt users.

auth.notes: CybelAngel uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Per-organization token. Webhooks for alert notification events. REST API documentation at api.cybelangel.com. Integration with Splunk, ServiceNow, and SOAR platforms. Analyst-enriched alerts with remediation guidance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; monitoring scope and asset count determine pricing
pricing.notes: Paris, France. Founded 2013. Private ($60M+ funding). Digital risk protection and external threat intelligence. 300+ enterprise customers. Strong financial services and pharmaceutical verticals. Exposed cloud storage (S3, Azure Blob) detection differentiator. French ANSSI certified. Competes with Digital Shadows and Recorded Future for DRP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; paginated alert results

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: Data classification review required before automated response — not all detected exposures are confirmed sensitive data
Analyst context value — CybelAngel provides analyst notes with remediation guidance; leverage this context in automation rather than raw alert data
Source code exposure — detected source code repos require developer team notification workflow; automated takedown actions need human approval
OAuth2 client credentials — standard OAuth2 flow; implement proper token refresh lifecycle
Webhook for alerting — polling is inefficient; configure webhooks for real-time alert delivery
French DRP vendor — strong EU data residency (GDPR-native); useful for European enterprise customers
agent_readiness.security_notes: Digital risk protection. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. Exposed data and digital risk intelligence.

security_score_components.security_notes: DRP and data leak. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. Exposed data and digital risk data.
